title: Al-Ma'mun 's designation of the Eighth Imam of the Shi'ah, 'Ali al-Rids, as his heir and the adoption of the 'Alid green colour
description: Al-Ma'mun 's designation of the Eighth Imam of the Shi'ah, 'Ali al-Rids, as his heir and the adoption of the 'Alid green colour. Recorded under the year 201 AH (c. 817 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
